programme.title: The Case Of Disappearances
programme.desc: Ketika Qing Cheng masih remaja, ia diserang oleh monster mutan yang tidak dikenal dan kehilangan keluarga serta ingatannya. Ia dianggap oleh penduduk desa sebagai orang yang tidak menyenangkan yang akan membawa bencana.

programme.title: Creepy Pasta
programme.desc: Terperangkap di sebuah rumah yang ditinggalkan, seorang pria tanpa nama mati-matian mencari petunjuk tentang bagaimana dia bisa sampai di sana. Jawabannya tersembunyi dalam serangkaian video viral yang mengganggu, yang masing-masing mulai menginfeksi pikirannya.

programme.title: Sinister, Ep 1
programme.desc: Serial antologi tentang makhluk jahat yang bersembunyi dalam bayang-bayang dunia kita dan tidak menginginkan apa pun selain melakukan hal-hal yang jahat.

programme.title: Ghost Wedding
programme.desc: Seorang fotografer terjerat oleh sesosok 'wanita berbaju merah' hingga menyebabkan kerabatnya tewas satu per satu. Ia pun bersumpah untuk mencari tahu kebenarannya saat gadis yang ia sukai juga tewas secara misterius.

programme.title: Chapter 1: Mae Nak Reborn
programme.desc: Mae Nak, sang istri hantu, kembali untuk membalas dendam atas seorang wanita hamil yang mengalami pelecehan seksual dan kehilangan bayinya. Tidak seorang pun dapat mengenali si penyerang kecuali Mae Nak, yang berubah menjadi roh jahat untuk menghukum si penyerang atas perbuatan jahatnya.

programme.title: Impermanence
programme.desc: Serangkaian kejadian aneh terjadi di sebuah desa, di antaranya sesosok mayat yang bangkit dari kuburnya dan melarikan diri. Saat diselidiki penduduk desa, seorang penjahat meninggal dan sang kepala desa menghilang.

programme.title: The Snitch
programme.desc: Dalam lingkaran kejahatan narkoba, informan 'Ya-Dang' menjual informasi kriminal. Penjahat menggunakannya untuk mengurangi hukuman, sementara penegak hukum menggunakannya untuk penangkapan. Ya-Dang, polisi, dan jaksa membentuk segitiga kunci.

programme.title: The Old Woman With The Knife
programme.desc: Seorang pembunuh bayaran tua yang mahir menyingkirkan penjahat terburuk di masyarakat bertemu dengan seorang anak didik muda yang bersemangat untuk mempelajari keahlian tersebut. Saat mereka menjalin ikatan yang tak terduga, pembunuh veteran itu menemukan tujuan baru di masa senja hidupnya yang penuh kekerasan dan rutinitas.

programme.title: Confession
programme.desc: Seorang pria yang menjadi tersangka kasus pembunuhan mencari bantuan dari seorang pengacara untuk membuktikan bahwa ia tidak bersalah. Saat mereka mulai mengumpulkan bukti-bukti, kebenaran pun perlahan terkuak.

programme.title: On The Line
programme.desc: Korban penipuan suara menyusup ke pusat layanan organisasi untuk mendapatkan uangnya kembali, tetapi ia justru menemukan penipuan skala besar lainnya saat melakukan aksinya.

programme.title: Life Is Beautiful
programme.desc: Se-yeon, yang mengabdikan seluruh hidupnya untuk keluarganya, tiba-tiba menderita penyakit yang sangat parah. Kini, ia bertekad untuk menjalani hidup dengan baik dan mencari cinta pertamanya dengan bantuan suaminya.

programme.title: My Worst Neighbor
programme.desc: Di sebuah rumah yang tidak kedap suara, seorang pria dan wanita yang tinggal bersebelahan memulai perang suara. Mereka menjalani kehidupan yang hanya dibatasi dinding tipis hingga saling jatuh cinta.

programme.title: The Killer
programme.desc: Seorang pembunuh yang kecewa menerima satu serangan terakhir dengan harapan dapat menggunakan penghasilannya untuk mengembalikan penglihatan seorang penyanyi yang secara tidak sengaja dibutakannya.

programme.title: Ditto
programme.desc: Ditto mengisahkan seorang mahasiswa teknik di sebuah universitas bernama Kim Yong. Dia mulai masuk kuliah tahun 1995, namun harus cuti hingga tahun 1999 karena menjalani wajib militer. Suatu hari, Yong menemukan sebuah radio antik yang bisa terhubung dengan masa depan. Yong berkomunikasi dengan Kim Mu-Nee, seorang mahasiswi yang hidup dimasa sekarang, berkuliah di jurusan sosiologi. Komunikasi dari dua periode berbeda ini membuat kisah hidup mereka terungkap satu sama lain.

programme.title: Once Again
programme.desc: Sebuah kisah tentang cinta dan keluarga yang berlatar belakang Keluarga Song, yang tak pernah memiliki hari yang tenang.

programme.title: New World
programme.desc: Kang, kepala kepolisian, memerintahkan polisi yang menyamar, Ja-Seoung, untuk berpartisipasi dalam proyek Dunia Baru. Namun, Ja-Seoung harus memilih antara mengikuti perintah Kang atau tetap setia kepada Jeong Cheong.

programme.title: Secret: Untold Melody
programme.desc: Kisah seorang pianis yang kariernya terhenti karena cedera. Di sekolah musik di Korea, ia jatuh cinta pada seorang wanita misterius yang menginspirasinya untuk menekuni musik lagi, mengungkap rahasia yang dapat membelokkan waktu.

programme.title: Once Again
programme.desc: Sebuah kisah tentang cinta dan keluarga yang berlatar belakang Keluarga Song, yang tak pernah memiliki hari yang tenang.

programme.title: Hear Me: Our Summer (tvN Movies)
programme.desc: Seorang wanita tunarungu dan seorang pengantar barang menggunakan sepeda motor menemukan koneksi meskipun ada hambatan komunikasi. Mereka menggunakan metafora burung air dan pohon yang gigih untuk melambangkan rintangan dalam percintaan dan mengarah pada komitmen yang lebih lanjut.

programme.title: Following (tvN Movies)
programme.desc: Sebuah film thriller misteri tentang seorang agen real estat yang diam-diam memasuki rumah klien dan terobsesi dengan seorang influencer media sosial yang suka menipu. Film ini mengeksplorasi tema obsesi, identitas, dan sisi gelap media sosial.

programme.title: Once We Were Us (tvN Movies)
programme.desc: Dua mantan kekasih bertemu kembali dalam penerbangan ke Korea, membangkitkan kenangan pertemuan tak sengaja mereka pada tahun 2008, ketika mereka menemukan cinta di tengah kekacauan Seoul sebelum kehidupan memisahkan mereka.

programme.title: Boss
programme.desc: Menampilkan anggota geng yang terlibat dalam persaingan sengit untuk mencapai impian mereka sendiri dalam kehidupan sehari-hari.

programme.title: Confession
programme.desc: Seorang pria yang menjadi tersangka kasus pembunuhan mencari bantuan dari seorang pengacara untuk membuktikan bahwa ia tidak bersalah. Saat mereka mulai mengumpulkan bukti-bukti, kebenaran pun perlahan terkuak.

programme.title: Streaming
programme.desc: Mengikuti seorang streamer misteri dengan jumlah pelanggan terbanyak, yang menyiarkan proses mengungkap petunjuk kasus pembunuhan berantai yang belum terpecahkan secara langsung.

programme.title: Spiritwalker
programme.desc: Seorang pria kehilangan ingatannya dan terbangun di dalam tubuh baru setiap 12 jam. Di tengah pencarian identitasnya, ia bertemu dengan seorang wanita yang mengaku mengenal dirinya.

programme.title: Spiritwalker

programme.title: Dr. Cheon & The Lost Talisman
programme.desc: Dr. Cheon merupakan seorang pengusir setan palsu yang tak bisa melihat atau mendengar hantu. Namun suatu hari, seorang wanita mendatangi Dr. Cheon dan memintanya untuk menyelamatkan adik perempuannya yang kerasukan.

programme.title: Bear Man
programme.desc: Dua ekor beruang dari sebuah Institut Teknologi berubah menjadi manusia setelah memakan bawang putih dan mugwort. Kini, salah satu dari mereka telah tumbuh menjadi polisi, sementara yang lain menjadi seorang gangster.

programme.title: Once We Were Us
programme.desc: Dua mantan kekasih bertemu kembali dalam penerbangan ke Korea, yang membangkitkan kenangan akan pertemuan tak terduga mereka pada tahun 2008, ketika mereka menemukan cinta di tengah hiruk-pikuk Seoul sebelum kehidupan memisahkan mereka.

programme.title: Train To Busan (tvN Movies)
programme.desc: Saat virus-zombie melanda Korea Selatan, para penumpang termasuk seorang ayah dan putrinya, pasangan saumi istri, dan beberapa siswa berjuang untuk bertahan hidup dalam kereta api dari Seoul ke Busan.

programme.title: The Witch: The Other One (tvN Movies)
programme.desc: Setelah melarikan diri dari laboratorium terpencil, seorang gadis muda dengan kekuatan luar biasa mendapati dirinya dalam pelarian dari beberapa organisasi misterius, mencari perlindungan dengan seorang wanita dan adik laki-lakinya.

programme.title: The Roundup: Punishment (tvN Movies)
programme.desc: Detektif Ma Seok-do bergabung dengan Tim Investigasi Cyber ​​untuk menangkap Baek Chang-ki, mantan tentara bayaran dan kepala organisasi perjudian daring.

programme.desc: Setelah penusukan, Do Kyung membawa saudara perempuannya yang tak sadarkan diri ke rumah sakit. Penyelidikan polisi mengungkap identitas palsu dan hubungan mengejutkan.

programme.title: Khiladi 786
programme.desc: Seorang ayah pemilik biro pernikahan menganggap putranya gagal dalam hidup. Untuk membuktikan ayahnya salah, sang putra menerima tantangan besar: mencarikan jodoh untuk adik seorang gangster, membawa mereka ke petualangan penuh kekacauan dan kejutan.

programme.title: Khiladi 786
programme.desc: Seorang ayah pemilik biro pernikahan menganggap putranya gagal dalam hidup. Untuk membuktikan ayahnya salah, sang putra menerima tantangan besar: mencarikan jodoh untuk adik seorang gangster, membawa mereka ke petualangan penuh kekacauan dan kejutan.

programme.title: Pal Pal Dil Ke Paas
programme.desc: Saher, seorang blogger video, memulai perjalanan untuk mengungkap Karan, pemilik perusahaan pariwisata yang ia yakini sebagai penipu. Awalnya mereka saling membenci, tapi secara perlahan mereka saling jatuh cinta.

programme.title: Attack

programme.title: Vedā
programme.desc: Perjalanan seorang wanita muda, yang menghadapi dan melawan sistem yang represif terhadap penggambaran tokoh antagonis.

programme.title: Thalapathy Is The G.O.A.T.
programme.desc: Pada tahun 2008, di Kenya, Satuan Khusus Anti-Terorisme (SATS), yang terdiri dari M. S. Gandhi dan rekan-rekannya Sunil Thiagarajan, Kalyan Sundaram, serta Ajay Govindharaj, menangkap teroris bernama Omar untuk merebut uranium darinya. Mantan pemimpin mereka, Rajiv Menon, yang buron setelah didakwa melakukan pengkhianatan, juga berada di kereta yang sama. Mereka berhasil mengambil uranium dari Menon dan menghancurkan kereta yang ditumpanginya, dengan keyakinan bahwa semua orang di dalam kereta, termasuk Menon, telah tewas.

programme.title: Mission Raniganj: The Great...

programme.title: Tuning – it doesn’t get any lower than that!
programme.desc: People's sport and people's fun. The topics in tuning today: Bavarian whirlwind: Tuner Hartge builds a lot of engine in very little BMW. The impressive result: The Hartge Compact 3.3 with 343 hp. Italian charmer: The Alfa 156 GTA shines with a wonderful V6, 250 hp and a sound to kneel down on. Does it also impress on the Nordschleife? Nocturnal twisting worm: The Night Drift Challenge in Oschersleben. Wolfsburg noble plane: The Golf R32 is not only elegant but also really sporty. 241 hp plus all-wheel drive make it possible. And: Allgäu DTM flair at home: The Abt Audi TT Limited 2. From the race track to the road. (Station info).

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.desc: At Action Concept it gets down to business: young stuntmen Daniel is supposed to do a forward somersault with his car. And beat up his colleague Lars. Adrenaline in its purest form – and all just for the camera. (Station info).

programme.title: A&E
programme.desc: The West Midlands Ambulance Service is called to millions of emergencies every year. The operations are often so intense that treatment begins on the street. The team of dedicated doctors and paramedics has the daily task of saving lives. (Station info).

programme.title: Motorcycles
programme.desc: The whole fascination of motorcycles: from super sports cars, naked bikes or tourers to cruisers, supermotos, freestyle motocross or racing machines. We drive anything that has two wheels. (Station info).

programme.title: Mission Mobility
programme.desc: A container on a gravel lot, surrounded by a colorful mix of used cars, some still in good shape, others a little polished - the previous owner has already left his fingerprint here. What is behind these slightly cranky-looking car dealers? In Motorvision TV, people in the automotive profession tell their stories. (Station info).

programme.title: Isle of Man Tourist Trophy
programme.desc: The highlight of every TT, the Senior TT. Hicky is considered the favorite, but 6 rounds have to be completed first. Can Harrison crack it this time or will Michael Dunlop rise from the ashes like Phoenix after 2 Supersport wins this week? Questions about questions – they are answered here. (Station info).

programme.title: Made in....
programme.desc: The British county of Chesire, in the tranquil town of Crewe, has been home to one of the most exclusive automobile manufacturers for 70 years: Bentley Motors. 400 hours of pure manual work, meticulous accuracy, a lot of technical know-how and a lot of passion from the employees turn the top model, the Bentley Mulsanne, into a sculpture on wheels. At Bentley, not only luxury traditionally plays a role, but also performance. Bentley Boy Steven Kane chases the Bentley Mulsanne Speed, which goes over 300 km/h and costs around 325,000 euros, around the race track. (Station info).

programme.title: Green wave
programme.desc: Compact, efficient and environmentally friendly. Electric minis are redefining urban lifestyles. With the Rocks-e, Opel wants to revolutionize city traffic and help young people get their first car. The e.GO Life has space for four people and a range that should be sufficient for everyday life. We tested it! Also: An overview of the latest small electric cars. (Station info).

programme.title: Dream Cars
programme.desc: Italy is the country of fashion, design and the most exciting cars in the world. In no other country are there as many well-known manufacturers of sports cars as in Italy. Ferrari, Lamborghini, Maserati and Alfa Romeo are considered the epitome of breathtaking cars around the world, designed with stunning shapes, capricious engines and unparalleled passion. Dream Cars presents the most exclusive and fastest sports cars from Ferrari, Maserati, Lamborghini and Alfa Romeo. (Station info).

programme.title: Crash
programme.desc: When ambition exceeds driving ability and when well-secured racing professionals are carried out of the curve, then we are there with the camera. Breathtaking stunts of professional drivers and slapsticks of sophisticated tin bullets. Spectacular scenes in which no one is harmed. (Station info).

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.desc: He helped found the legend of the German Silver Arrows: the Mercedes W 125 Grand Prix car from 1937. Big names like Rudolf Caracciola and Manfred von Brauchitsch competed for victories in the single-seater with up to over 600 hp. At the Großglockner Grand Prix, former Formula 1 driver Jochen Mass drives the Silver Arrow up the 92 curves to the Großglockner. (Station info).

programme.title: Cars + Life
programme.desc: In addition to the classic Sportback variant, Audi also offers the A3 as a sedan. We subjected this model to extensive practical testing. Also: the Lexus RX, the revised version of the premium SUV from Toyota's luxury brand on the test site in Ibiza. And: Volkswagen is also launching a new model variant of the e-Up! after. (Station info).

programme.title: Car History
programme.sub-title: Mercedes racing: the beginning of an era
programme.desc: Power, passion, pole position – Mercedes has been writing motorsport history for 120 years. The list of successes of the brand with the star is long. As early as 1894, a Daimler and a Benz took part in the first car race. The victories at the French Grand Prix in 1908 and 1914 are outstanding. Car History shows how Mercedes dominated racing from the first automobile race onwards. (Station info).

programme.title: Nordschleife
programme.desc: Racing legend Jackie Stewart once described the Nordschleife of the Nürburgring as a multi-limbed monster and gave it the name 'Green Hell'. The legendary track is also regularly accessible to the general public. Many “racers at heart” race through Schwedenkreuz, Fuchsrohre, Kesselchen and Karussell in their private cars. Once through the “Green Hell” a dream for many that no one has to stay. Nordschleife fans take the spectators on board and tell them what they associate with the ring. (Station info).

programme.title: On Tour
programme.desc: Bavaria Historic Rally Around 3,000 “Schnauferl” cavort in front of a picturesque. Polished to a high gloss, for some people it's more sporty, for others it's more comfortable and for others, above all, it's "skillful" on the slopes. (Station info).

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: When choosing a vehicle, price plays a role, as does equipment, drive, space and much more. There are certain characteristics that manufacturers use to assign their vehicle models to a vehicle class. However, there is no clear and generally valid definition of these classes and the boundaries are often blurred. S in the luxury class from Mercedes-Benz is not the same as S in the Audi S3. What does Q stand for on the Infinity Q50 for more quality? We present the vehicles and visit the Shanghai Auto Show, one of the most important automobile exhibitions in China. (Station info).

programme.title: Rear view mirror
programme.desc: Four powered wheels are better than two. This was once established. The Quattro drive is now almost 30 years old. Rearview mirror presents Audi and the Quattro drive. An innovative and very successful story. (Station info).

programme.title: Tuning – it doesn’t get any lower than that!
programme.desc: Premium tuners and factory tuners: More and more horsepower, better and better sound, ever lower chassis, there are no limits. The finest tuning has to offer. Tips and tricks for lowering, repairing and pimping up. We show you what you can do and how to do it. (Station info).

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.desc: The stuntheroes from Action Concept are tough professionals. They throw themselves off houses, cause cars to fly or explode. Without the necessary seriousness and constant concentration when carrying out your work, nothing works. We sent our reporter Dean Malay to Action Concept to get to know the people, the characters behind the hard shell. Stunt coordinator Domi shows Dean the work processes at Action Concept, but also explains why the stuntman is called Tobi, Heidi. (Station info).

programme.title: Top Speed Classic
programme.desc: Moderator Martin Utberg welcomes the former racing driver and car designer Erich Bitter in Seefeld in Tyrol. During a tour of the Seefeld Olympic region, the now 87-year-old Bitter talks about his life, his career and his passions. (Station info).

programme.title: Super Cars
programme.desc: It is considered the most successful luxury sedan in the world, a synonym for comfort and opulence and sets standards in terms of technology and safety: the Mercedes S-Class. But why is that so? What makes this vehicle so special and sets it apart from all others? We drive all model series, from the 450 SEL 6.9 to the current S 580 e, and explore the fascination of each model. (Station info).

programme.title: Rally 2024
programme.desc: Chantilly Arts & Elegance combines motorsport history with haute couture in an exclusive event. Historic racing cars, elegant bodies and stylish fashion presentations make this meeting unique. (Station info).

programme.title: Top Speed Classic
programme.desc: Moderator Martin Utberg and his team partner Günter Baier are taking part in the Franken Classic, one of the most beautiful vintage car rallies in Germany. The participants discover Franconia and its most beautiful sides on picturesque routes. (Station info).

programme.title: Isle of Man Tourist Trophy
programme.desc: The Isle of Man Tourist Trophy is considered the toughest and most dangerous motorcycle race in the world, with riders reaching speeds of up to 200mph. (Station info).

programme.title: Icelandic Formula Off-Road
programme.desc: Formula Off Road was invented in Iceland. Hoping to raise more money for the Icelandic rescue teams, the teams began showing their 4WD cars in action in the Icelandic hills. (Station info).

programme.title: US Pro Pulling
programme.sub-title: Mackville, Wisconsin, Unlimited Super Stock Tractors
programme.desc: Motorsport like you've never seen it before. In this competition, drivers use multi-engine, modified tractors to pull a heavy sled around the track. Some tractors can even produce more than 12,000 horsepower. This makes tractor pulling the strongest motorsport in the world. (Station info).

programme.title: Isle of Man Tourist Trophy 2026
programme.desc: The Isle of Man Tourist Trophy is considered the toughest and most dangerous motorcycle race in the world, with riders reaching speeds of up to 200mph. (Station info).

programme.title: Going Pro 2026
programme.desc: The seventh season of the Going Pro TV series follows Damon Surzyshyn and the entire PROsport Racing team in the 2026 ADAC GT4 Germany season (channel information).

programme.title: Fastzone 2026
programme.desc: The show takes the audience into the fascinating world of international racing. The format combines thrilling motorsport action with in-depth analysis and provides a comprehensive overview of important racing series around the globe. In addition to spectacular scenes on the track, the format offers exciting background reports, technical insights and stories about drivers, teams and their challenges. This creates a diverse look at speed, competition and the passion that drives motorsport worldwide. (Station info).

programme.title: Biker Lifestyle
programme.desc: The north of Thailand is a popular travel destination, not just for adventurous individual tourists. The north is known for its mountainous, densely forested areas and therefore this region is also a paradise for motorcyclists. Thousands of curves on well-developed roads with little traffic and a diversity of culture and landscape make this region a perfect holiday destination for us to escape the winter in Germany for the fourth time. We will take you on a 1600 km long motorcycle tour to the most beautiful places in northern Thailand. (Station info).

programme.title: Biker Lifestyle

programme.title: Isle of Man Tourist Trophy
programme.desc: The Isle of Man Tourist Trophy is considered the toughest and most dangerous motorcycle race in the world, with riders reaching speeds of up to 200mph. (Station info).

programme.title: 4x4 – Das Allrad Magazin
programme.desc: Sand, scree, water or asphalt Adventures can be had on any surface if you have the right vehicle. The Can-Am Outlander and Maverick R are the ultimate fun machines for off-road driving fun. We put them to the test in Portugal. And this is supposed to be a Smart? Yes, actually #5 turns everything we thought we knew about the popular kissing ball upside down. (Station info).

programme.title: New Zealand Jetsprint Championship
programme.desc: The New Zealand Jetsprint Championship is the most important sprint boat competition from New Zealand, the country where the sport was founded in 1981. Jetsprinting is comparable to rally sports, but there is only one boat on the track at any given time and boats drive at very high speeds. The up to 500 HP strong jet sprint boats therefore try to achieve the best time on the tracks. (Senderinfo).

programme.title: Tour European Rally 2026
programme.desc: The Tour European Rally 2023 traditionally starts with the promo event in Finland. The 58th edition of the spectacular Arctic Lapland Rally offers pure action and excitement on the snow and ice slopes of Finland. (Station info).

programme.title: Rallye: Dubai International Baja Rally
programme.desc: The international rally event has been part of the “FIA Marathon Rally Worldcup” since 2017. Previously it was the closing event of the “Middle East Rally Championship”. The record winner is Mohammed bin Sulayem. (Station info).

programme.title: Rear view mirror
programme.desc: Would you like a bit of nostalgia? The BMW 328 was considered the dream sports car of the 1930s. Not only is it beautiful, but it was also very successful in motorsport. Rearview mirror introduces the brisk Bavaria. (Station info).

programme.title: Isle of Man Tourist Trophy
programme.desc: Another total cancellation of the race day on the Isle of Man due to the weather, but instead we had the opportunity to talk in more detail with the Crowe brothers and Davey Todd and take a look back at the most spectacular races of the week. (Station info).

programme.title: Road Wars Staffel 6
programme.desc: Drug crime, house searches, chases: Roadwars accompanies a special unit of the British police. Together with the dog team, they declare war on the thieves in the Thamse Vally. (Station info).

programme.title: Road Wars Staffel 6
programme.desc: Drug crime, house searches, chases: Roadwars accompanies a special unit of the British police. Together with the dog team, they declare war on the thieves in the Thamse Vally. (Station info).

programme.title: Acura Grand Prix of Long Beach, Streets of Long Beach, California
programme.sub-title: Acura Grand Prix of Long Beach, Streets of Long Beach, California

programme.title: Cars + Life
programme.desc: On the occasion of Skoda's 125th anniversary, we look back at the eventful history of one of the oldest automobile manufacturers in the world. Also: our practical test of the Volkswagen ID.3, the first purely electric car from VW. And: the McLaren 720S Spider, the super sports car is now also available as a convertible. (Station info).

programme.title: A&E
programme.desc: The West Midlands Ambulance Service is called to millions of emergencies every year. The operations are often so intense that treatment begins on the street. The team of dedicated doctors and paramedics has the daily task of saving lives. (Station info).

programme.title: Motorcycles
programme.sub-title: New entry-level bikes from Triumph and BMW
programme.desc: Hardly anyone represents the myth of the Triumph motorcycle brand like Steve McQueen. The actor and racing driver would certainly be excited today about the brand new entry-level Street Twin model, with which the traditional British brand wants to assert itself against increasing competition in nostalgic motorcycles. The 900 cc model from Thai production combines classic design with the latest technology. Our driving report shows how the new Triumph Street Twin, the entry-level model in the Bonneville series, performs during test drives in Valencia. (Station info).

programme.title: Mission Mobility
programme.desc: A container on a gravel lot, surrounded by a colorful mix of used cars, some still in good shape, others a little polished - the previous owner has already left his fingerprint here. What is behind these slightly cranky-looking car dealers? In Motorvision TV, people in the automotive profession tell their stories. What motivates the scrap dealer? What stories can the gas station attendant tell? (Station info).

programme.title: Made in....
programme.desc: Dülmen near Münster – this is where one of the most spectacular German sports cars is handcrafted: the Wiesmann. It arose from an obsession of the car-crazy brothers Friedhelm and Martin Wiesmann, who managed to build their own sports car company with passion and persistence. (Station info).

programme.title: Green wave
programme.desc: Price drop and range revolution. Electric cars overcome old prejudices. The Dacia Spring is one of the cheapest electric cars on the market. A real bargain or are there hidden catches? Volvo's answer to Tesla & Co. The new XC 40 comes with an extended range. How effective is it on a mountain road trip? (Station info).

programme.title: Dream Cars
programme.desc: Whether Jaguar, Rolls Royce or Bentley, Aston Martin or McLaren, Dream Cars - England shows the most exciting, beautiful and fastest dream cars from Great Britain. Whether luxury sedan, coupe or super sports car, the cars from England combine tradition with exclusive luxury, exceptional performance and unique British flair. (Station info).

programme.title: Crash
programme.desc: When ambition exceeds driving ability and when well-secured racing professionals are carried out of the curve, then we are there with the camera. Breathtaking stunts of professional drivers and slapsticks of sophisticated tin bullets. Spectacular scenes in which no one is harmed. (Station info).

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.desc: Classic Rides rummages through the automotive treasure chest and brings to light some almost forgotten, some noble, some bizarre cars from the last few decades. The VW 181, called the ''Kübel'', was presented in 1969 as one of the most bizarre cars ever built: open, spacious, solid, cheap and four-door. Designed for the Bundeswehr, it initially found hardly any civilian buyers. (Station info).

programme.title: Cars + Life
programme.desc: Fuel of the future? Hydrogen and wind power? Hamburg Airport is experimenting with the climate-neutral production of kerosene. Also: six generations of Porsche 911 Turbo at the Hockenheimring with ex-rally world champion Walter Röhrl. And: the Aston Martin DBS Superleggera super sports car in the driving report and the Q2, Audi's smallest SUV, in the test. (Station info).

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: Good and conservative, American and avant-garde - in the 60s and 70s, Ford built one classic after another and always according to the Ford formula: simple technology, pleasant shape, affordable price. Taunus, bathtub, escort and Capri, today they are all cult. Car History shows the Ford classics. (Station info).

programme.title: Nordschleife
programme.desc: Today we start with our Nordschleife tourists, who - as soon as the track is a little drier - appear again at the ring and pursue their favorite hobby: accelerate and let the tires smoke! (Station info).

programme.title: On Tour
programme.desc: This time in Enduropark Training – Shirin takes part in an Enduro; Take part in off-road training at the Enduropark Hechlingen and realize that it is anything but a picnic. (Station info).

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: Today it's about bestsellers and long-running favorites: Seat's best-selling model is celebrating its birthday: the Ibiza turns 40! To mark the milestone anniversary, the manufacturer is releasing a special model. We test it and take a look back at the successes of this small car. And the big comparison: Mitsubishi ASX competes against its sister models Nissan Juke and Renault Captur. Who is ahead? (Station info).

programme.title: Rear view mirror
programme.desc: The highlights from all eras of automobile history: When the brand new Mercedes A-Class fell over in the moose test, when Stirling Moss won the Mille Miglia in record time, when Ferdinand Porsche amazed the world with an electric car in 1900. Exciting images show the viewer what really happened. Contemporary witnesses report on their experiences. The Mercedes Simplex is the ancestor of the Mercedes models. It was built from 1902 to 1906. Wilhelm Maybach once developed the Simplex as a successor to the Mercedes 35 HP. (Station info).

programme.title: Tuning – it doesn’t get any lower than that!
programme.desc: In Dubai, the legendary Supercars police fleet hunts down speeders and illegal parkers. And at MTM and Alpina they get more power from the Audis and BMWs. The Audi S8 MTM Talladega R starts with a whopping 802 hp. And the Stuck brothers Johannes and Ferdinand drive the Alpina D5 over the track and delight us with happy flying stunts. We can only hope that the police don't notice. (Station info).

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.desc: The second season of the unique report series “Stunt Heroes” also offers endless action. Breathtaking car stunts, spectacular motorcycle crashes, daring body stunts. The stuntmen from Action Concept are leaders in their field across Europe. Stunt coordinator Christoph Domanski looks back at the stunts from the last twelve shows and explains why a stunt sometimes works better in a test than on a film set. The show summarizes all the stunts of the second season and shows how creatively cars are destroyed, motorcycles destroyed and film stunts are implemented - garnished with the best outtakes! (Station info).

programme.title: Top Speed Classic
programme.desc: Moderator Martin Utberg and his team partner Narkus Neser take part in the Black Forest Winter Challenge, one of the funniest winter rallies in Germany (channel info).

programme.title: Super Cars
programme.desc: What has long been known in motorsport is also finding its way more and more into road vehicles: lightweight construction. Carbon is often the keyword here. The small series manufacturer Roding from the Upper Palatinate produces a sports car that, despite a relatively low output of 320 hp, even outshines the Porsche GT3 with a power-to-weight ratio of 2.98 kilos per hp. Several super-light sports cars come from England: Lotus, Caterham and Radical know how to really slim down. (Station info).

programme.title: Tour European Rally 2026
programme.desc: The Tour European Rally 2023 traditionally starts with the promo event in Finland. The 58th edition of the spectacular Arctic Lapland Rally offers pure action and excitement on the snow and ice slopes of Finland. (Station info).

programme.title: Isle of Man Tourist Trophy
programme.desc: At the start of the TT 2025, we take a look at the first qualifying sessions and look forward to Lee Johnston as co-commentator (channel info).

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.desc: He helped found the legend of the German Silver Arrows: the Mercedes W 125 Grand Prix car from 1937. Big names like Rudolf Caracciola and Manfred von Brauchitsch competed for victories in the single-seater with up to over 600 hp.

programme.title: Cars + Life

programme.title: Car History
programme.sub-title: Mercedes racing: the beginning of an era

programme.desc: Tom Lane is the star columnist for the media conglomerate owned San Francisco Sun newspaper. The company is thinking about increasing Tom's exposure by producing a new television show around him. Liz Madison is the advice columnist for the little read community newspaper, the Marin County Voice, which is a throwback to gentler times. Besides their journalistic occupations, one other similar aspect between Tom and Liz is that they are both currently single, with their friends and family doing whatever they can to find that special someone for their personal life. On November 2, the staff at the Voice learn that the Sun ownership has bought their newspaper, with the probable goal of folding it into the operations of the Sun. If this move does happen, the staff at the Voice will lose their jobs. To fight back, Liz decides to change her column to an editorial espousing the meaning of Christmas and the newspaper to the community.

programme.title: Halloween
programme.desc: On a cold Halloween night in 1963, six-year-old Michael Myers brutally murdered his 17-year-old sister, Judith. He was sentenced and locked away for 15 years. But on October 30, 1978, while being transferred for a court date, a 21-year-old Michael Myers steals a car and escapes Smith's Grove. He returns to his quiet hometown of Haddonfield, Illinois, where he looks for his next victims.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.desc: S2 E14 — Bizzarrini GT 5300The Bizzarrini GT 5300 from 1965 was supposed to heat up the Ferraris on the race track. Giotto Bizzarrini wanted to use this car to return the favor to his former employer Enzo Ferrari, because the employment relationship ended in a dispute.

programme.title: Cars + Life
programme.desc: E8 — Episode 8The Macan is one of the most successful Porsche models. The show is dedicated to the new edition of the Macan Turbo. The Hyundai i20 is also being tested and the team is doing another round of the Toyota winter driving school.

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: S1 E18 — FordFord produces one classic car after another in the '60s and '70s. The formula for this is: simple technology, attractive shape, affordable price. The cult cars include Taunus, Escort and Capri.

programme.title: Nordschleife
programme.desc: S1 E14 — Tourists in the Green Hell 14The Nordschleife of the Nürburgring is regularly open to the general public. Many people drive through the “Green Hell” in their private vehicles. Fascinating Nordschleife fans talk about what they associate with the ring.

programme.title: On Tour
programme.desc: Dubai Motor ShowEvery two years the Dubai Motor Show gets bigger and bigger, with more than 100,000 visitors expected for the eleventh edition for the first time. More than 500 cars will be on display. The question is, how can someone attract attention?

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: S1 E18 — Off the RoadA bit of madness is part of it when off-road enthusiasts drive 800-horsepower monsters to perform breakneck maneuvers in the toughest off-road trophies. The show finds some of the best top off-roaders off the road.

programme.title: Rear view mirror
programme.desc: S1 E11 — Wartburg 313The highlights of automobile history are shown: This time it's about the Wartburg 313.

programme.title: Tuning - it doesn't get any lower!
programme.desc: S1 E26 — Night Drift ChallengeThe topics include: "Bavarian whirlwind: Tuner Hartge builds a lot of engine in very little BMW" and "Italian charmer: The Alfa 156 GTA shines with a wonderful V6, 250 hp. Does it also impress on the Nordschleife?".

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.desc: S1 E2 — Salto MortaleA stuntman launches a daring stunt and two others combine racing and a fist fight.

programme.title: Top Speed Classic
programme.desc: S5 E86 — Classic Autumn TourThis year the route leads from Seefeld in Tyrol to the Dolomites and Lake Iseo. After 700 kilometers the tour goes back to Seefeld via the Timmelsjoch.

programme.title: Super Cars
programme.desc: S16 E232 — Mobility from MorganIt is the vision of an electric future from AMG: The Concept AMG GT XX delivers an incredible 1360 hp and charges faster than you can say “range anxiety”. We were there for the spectacular world premiere.

programme.title: Road Wars Staffel 7
programme.desc: S7 E12 — The ArrestDaryll helps his colleagues arrest a suspect, while Giles and Roger take down a few drug mules. Meanwhile, Gareth arrests a young man for disturbing the peace.

programme.title: NZ Jetsprint Championship 2025
programme.desc: The New Zealand Jetsprint Championship is the most important sprint boat competition from New Zealand, the country where the sport was founded in 1981. Jetsprinting is comparable to rally sports, but there is only one boat on the track at any given time and boats drive at very high speeds. The up to 500 HP strong jet sprint boats therefore try to achieve the best time on the tracks.

programme.title: Cars + Life

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: Mercedes Racing: Beginning of an EraSince 1894, the year of the world's first car race, Mercedes has dominated. The list of successes of the brand with the star is endless. Particularly notable were the wins at the French Grand Prix in 1908 and 1914.

programme.title: Premier Padel 2025 Italien Major - Highlights
programme.desc: Padel action in the Foro Italico: The highlights of the Italian Major in Rome show the best rallies, close duels and the decisive points of the tournament.

programme.title: Premier Padel 2025 Buenos Aires P1 - Highlights

programme.title: The Streets Don't Lie
programme.desc: London - LeipzigDjibril Cissé picks three players on the streets of London, England. But only one is allowed to train with RB Leipzig.

programme.title: The Streets Don't Lie
programme.desc: Berlin - SalzburgThree players with a tough past come to train at the Red Bull Academy in Salzburg. Previously they struggled to assert themselves due to poor health, lack of self-confidence or lack of support.

programme.title: The Streets Don't Lie
programme.desc: Paris - New YorkCircumstances have held back three players from Paris. Now they get another chance to establish themselves as professional soccer players and train with the New York Red Bulls.

programme.title: Signed or Released
programme.desc: S1 E1 — Playing under pressureFive football talents under the age of 19 are fighting for their future at RB Leipzig. Before the first game, the pressure among them is already growing immensely as the coaches watch them closely and check who can make the jump.

programme.title: Signed or Released
programme.desc: S1 E2 — Struggling to break throughThe pressure is growing at RB Leipzig: Nani Mekonnen gets his chance in first team training, while Dominic Minz unfortunately has to tremble after his red card. What the team needs even more now is a win.

programme.title: Signed or Released
programme.desc: S1 E3 — Time to shineScouts watch the team as they look to overtake Wolfsburg and move into fourth place. Meanwhile, Lukas Schelenz is struggling for his future and Dominic Minz is waiting for the verdict on his appeal.

programme.title: Signed or Released
programme.desc: S1 E4 — Too many distractionsOn the way to fourth place, the talent must stay focused as the pressure mounts.

programme.title: Signed or Released
programme.desc: S1 E5 — RB LeipzigDecisive days are now approaching for four talents: Niclas Stierlin, Kilian Ludewig, Naod Nani Mekonnen and Emre Diego Aslan are all fighting for their chances, new contracts and to find their own way in professional football.

programme.title: E3 - English weeks
programme.desc: S1 E3After the game against Rapid, the players and their families meet at Mondsee.

programme.title: Neymar Jr. Full Access
programme.desc: S1 E148 hours until the derby: Neymar Jr. between home, focus and stadium pressure - an exclusive look behind the scenes of a superstar before the big game.

programme.title: No Contest: Off Tour
programme.desc: S2 E4 — South AfricaSouth African professional surfers Jordy Smith and Mikey February immerse themselves in the magic of South Africa and its vibrant surfing culture and community.

programme.title: SURF: Shaping Jordy
programme.desc: For the first time in 10 years, surfer Jordy Smith is spending the winter in his native South Africa. With the free surfing master Mikey February he goes in search of the best waves.

programme.title: Close Up
programme.desc: S1 E6 — Adrian MatternIn this edition, the whitewater kayaker Adrian Mattern from Heidelberg is a guest. Among other things, he talks about his dreams, how important risk assessment is in the sport and why, for him, fear is not the enemy.
